description: Add three custom fields to Vicidial List ID 8501 ('US Senator Advocacy') using the Admin interface (User: 6666, Pass: andromeda) to capture campaign-specific data. Create a SELECT field named 'policy_position' (Label: Policy Position) with options SUPPORTS, OPPOSES, UNDECIDED, and NO_RESPONSE. Create a TEXT field named 'staff_contact_name' (Label: Staff Contact Name) with a size of 50. Create a DATE field named 'followup_date' (Label: Follow-up Date). Ensure all fields are active and the custom table is created.
